CVE-2022-31212.title: An issue was discovered in dbus-broker before 31. It depends on c ...
CVE-2022-31212.summary: An issue was discovered in dbus-broker before 31. It depends on c-uitl/c-shquote to parse the DBus service's Exec line. c-shquote contains a stack-based buffer over-read if a malicious Exec line is supplied.

CVE-2022-31213.title: An issue was discovered in dbus-broker before 31. Multiple NULL p ...
CVE-2022-31213.summary: An issue was discovered in dbus-broker before 31. Multiple NULL pointer dereferences can be found when supplying a malformed XML config file.
